title: Smart Brief Panel — Morning Brief in Home Chat Modal
context: The general chat modal (bottom nav chat icon, Home route) currently opens to an empty chat. This replaces that empty state with a Smart Brief panel showing all 3 markets (US, Finland, Vietnam) with recap data, watchlist, and cross-market questions. Favourites are cosmetic only — the brief always shows regardless of favourite count. Tapping a market block replaces the brief with that market's recap detail + thread composer using the real recap chat API. Ticker detail page chat is unchanged.

decisions.data_source: Aggregate existing /api/markets/{market}/recaps client-side. Daily first, weekly fallback.
decisions.heuristic: favCount per market → locale tie-break → US fallback. Determines primary (hero) vs secondary (collapsed). All 3 markets always shown.
decisions.recap_tap: Custom RecapDetailView renders recap inline with bullets, source chips, related questions, and 'Back to brief' link. Does NOT use generic ThreadView.
decisions.watchlist_taps: Tapping a watchlist row navigates to /tickers/{ticker} via next/link.
decisions.brief_visibility: Shows on Home route chat when no NormalThreads exist and activeRecapId is null. FAQ threads are ignored for this check.
decisions.favourites_role: Cosmetic only — 'N favourites here' labels, watchlist section visibility, primary ranking.
decisions.cross_market_questions: 1 random question picked from each market's recap.questions. Section hidden when no recaps have questions.
decisions.recap_caching: React Query useQueries per market, ~5 min stale time. Independent from MarketRecapIsland's fetch — different needs (3 markets vs 1, React Query vs useEffect).
decisions.header: BriefHeader component with sun icon, 'Your morning brief' title, 'Focused on {primary}' subtitle, and close button. Replaces default ChatHeader when on Home route.
decisions.font_sizes: Use standard Tailwind scale: text-base md:text-lg for body content (matches MarketRecapCard), text-sm for secondary text, text-xs for labels/meta.
decisions.faq_on_home: Disabled. useFAQQuery has enabled: !!ticker. ChatProvider skips FAQ thread seeding when ticker is undefined.

learnings: ChatProvider seeds FAQ threads on mount — had to gate with `if (!ticker) return` and `enabled: !!ticker` in useFAQQuery, otherwise brief was hidden behind FAQ threads.
showBrief logic needed `threads.some(t => isNormalThread(t))` not `threads.length === 0`, because FaqThreads auto-seeded by ChatProvider shouldn't block the brief.
Design prototype used 10-12.5px fonts for a 420px compact panel — too small for the full chat modal. Scaled up to standard Tailwind (text-xs/sm/base/lg).

Recap detail view should NOT use generic ThreadView/AnswerContent — recap bullets need structured rendering (colored dots, inline source chips) matching MarketRecapCard style. Created dedicated RecapDetailView component.
Locale tie-break needed to match against backendCode (US/FI/VN) not just market aliases (USA/Finland/Vietnam), since navigator.language gives 'fi-FI' → 'FI'.
FinancialChatbox is accumulating too many responsibilities (generic chat + brief + recap detail + API switching). Flagged for extraction into HomeChatbox — deferred.
useBriefData and MarketRecapIsland both fetch /api/markets/{code}/recaps but have different needs (3 markets parallel + React Query vs 1 market + useEffect). Not worth sharing yet.
useChatState had no clearThreads method — added one for 'Back to brief' to reset state cleanly.
tech_debt: Extract HomeChatbox from FinancialChatbox — Chat.tsx handles too many concerns (spawned as task chip)
RecapContextCard in RecapChatModal.tsx is not reused — RecapDetailView duplicates some recap rendering logic
DeltaPill is stubbed (renders null) — needs structured index delta data from backend

milestones.title: Market Pulse Cards — Primary Hero + Secondary Accordion
milestones.description: Render the top section of the Smart Brief: data hooks, primary PulseCard hero, secondary CollapsedMarketRows with accordion, section labels. Wire into BottomNavigation chat modal as children of ChatboxUI. Header shows brief title/subtitle.
milestones.commit: 9786d3d feat(smart-brief): multi-market morning brief in Home chat modal
files_modified: app/components/Chat.tsx — BriefHeader, FinancialChatbox brief state, RecapDetailView integration

milestones.title: Watchlist Section — 'On your watchlist'
milestones.description: Render the cross-market watchlist section below the pulse cards. Shows favourite companies sorted primary-market-first with market flags. Tapping a row navigates to /tickers/{ticker}. Hidden when 0 favourites.

milestones.commit: 7e2da4c feat(smart-brief): M3 cross-market questions + unified QuestionRow
milestones.note: DigRow was implemented as unified QuestionRow.tsx (with QuestionRow.test.tsx) instead of DigRow.tsx
milestones.title: Across Markets Section — Cross-Market Questions
milestones.description: Render the 'Across markets' section with 3 hardcoded cross-market questions. Tapping a question transitions to thread view using the chat API.

edge_cases: Market with no recap data: PulseCard/Row shows 'No recap available' state
0 favourites: Brief still shows all 3 markets, watchlist hidden, fav count labels hidden
Favourites changing while brief open: useMemo recalculates
Empty recap.questions: no question chips rendered
Long headlines: line-clamp removed on PulseCard (was clamp-3), first sentence on collapsed row
Dark mode: uses existing CSS vars
